ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "web" TEXT /* Website URL of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the user */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "founded_at" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_companies" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company associated with the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user at the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started working at the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user ended working at the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_locations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started living at the location */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user ended living at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the connection */,
  "connected_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accepted the connection */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date the connection was established */,
  "connection_status" TEXT /* Status of the connection (e.g. 'accepted', 'pending', 'declined') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_connected_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("connected_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the connection request */,
  "requested_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the connection request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the connection request was sent */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the connection request (e.g. 'pending', 'accepted', 'declined') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connection_requests_requested_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("requested_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connection_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message (e.g. 'delivered', 'read', 'unread') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the network was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_networks" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network associated with the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the network (e.g. 'admin', 'member') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g. 'published', 'draft') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g. 'published', 'draft') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
